title: Fifth Dimension
public_claim: This is the "single recommended upload" bundle for resuming the Fifth Dimension Engine Room — a MuranoOS room (id MURANO-ROOM-SERLING-001) dedicated to preserving Rod Serling stylistic DNA, storing a 100-episode anthology corpus, tracking provenance/revisions, balancing seasons, and drafting teleplays.
distinctive_mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention
use_value: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Fifth Dimension, so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.
